name: sync registries: /standards-add auto-creates the inferred-namespace folder and scaffolds <id>.yaml with populated source: header (per G-9)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" --url https://my-publisher.example.com/guide --id my-publisher-guide --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f "tree/my-publisher/my-publisher-guide.yaml" ] && grep "authoritative_url: https://my-publisher.example.com/guide" "tree/my-publisher/my-publisher-guide.yaml" 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
